emails.body: Shirley, Please, send this memo to the entire group and ask if this demo was given to anybody in our group. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 11/06/2000 05:10 PM Kevin Sweeney 10/23/2000 06:53 AM

emails.subject: Pro Opticus
emails.body: Good morning all: Below is an email from Kevin Sweeney inquiring about a software demo that he thought might have been in our group. If anyone had this demo, please let Vince know. Thanks! Shirley Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 11/06/2000 05:10 PM Kevin Sweeney 10/23/2000 06:53 AM
